creator: werner@btp1da.phy.uni-bayreuth.de
text:
The urt-port don't link in FreeBSD-Current ELF because tiff34 depends
on jpeg .

Fix: commit the following diff for urt/patches/patch-aa .
The diff also works for FreeBSD 2.2.7-STABLE .

#diff -u patch-aa.ori patch-aa
How-To-Repeat: Do a "make" in /usr/ports/graphics/urt with FreeBSD-Current ELF
